svg.text: ECO-SIM: Yellow Ipê × Carpenter Bee - Bloom Synchrony & Migration
Leafless golden flowering & carpenter-bee migratory wave

g.text: Ipê blooms leafless in the dry season (Jul–Sep),
golden crown with no leaves to compete.
All patch trees bloom within days of each other
(mass flowering), a beacon visible 40+ km away.
This draws a migratory Xylocopa wave that
